title: Google Gemini Generate Content Schema
description: JSON Schema definitions for the Google Gemini API generateContent request and response objects, covering all core models including Content, Part, GenerationConfig, SafetySetting, Candidate, and UsageMetadata.

Blob.description: Raw media bytes with MIME type information for inline media content.

mimeType.description: The IANA standard MIME type of the source data. Examples: image/png, image/jpeg, audio/mp3, video/mp4.

data.description: Raw bytes for media formats encoded as a base64 string.

FileData.description: URI-based reference for media uploaded via the Files API.

mimeType.description: The IANA standard MIME type of the source data.

fileUri.description: URI of the file uploaded via the Files API.

FunctionCall.description: A predicted function call returned from the model containing the function name and arguments.

name.description: The name of the function to call.

args.description: The function parameters and values in JSON object format.

FunctionResponse.description: The result output from a FunctionCall containing the function name and structured JSON response.

name.description: The name of the function that was called.

response.description: The function response in JSON object format.

Part.description: A datatype containing media that is part of a multi-part Content message. A Part can contain text, inline media data, file references, function calls, or function responses.

Content.description: The base structured datatype containing multi-part content of a message. Includes a role field designating the producer and a parts field with the message data.

parts.description: Ordered parts that constitute a single message. Parts may have different MIME types.

role.description: The producer of the content. Must be either 'user' or 'model'.

FunctionDeclaration.description: Structured representation of a function declaration including the function name, description, and parameters.

description.description: A brief description of the function.

parameters.description: Describes the parameters to this function using OpenAPI 3.0 Parameter Object format.

Tool.description: Tool details that the model may use to generate responses, including function declarations and code execution.

functionDeclarations.description: A list of function declarations available to the model for function calling.

codeExecution.description: Enables the model to execute code as part of generation. Pass an empty object to enable.

FunctionCallingConfig.description: Configuration for specifying function calling behavior.

mode.description: Specifies the mode in which function calling should execute.

allowedFunctionNames.description: Function names that limit which functions the model will call. Only applicable when mode is ANY.

ToolConfig.description: Configuration containing parameters for specifying Tool use in the request.

HarmCategory.description: The category of harm that a safety setting or rating applies to.

SafetySetting.description: Safety setting that affects the safety-blocking behavior. Controls the probability threshold at which content is blocked for a given harm category.

threshold.description: Controls the probability threshold at which harm is blocked.

GenerationConfig.description: Configuration options for model generation and outputs including temperature, token limits, sampling parameters, and structured output settings.

candidateCount.description: Number of generated responses to return. Currently can only be set to 1.

stopSequences.description: Character sequences (up to 5) that will stop output generation.

maxOutputTokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to include in a response candidate.

temperature.description: Controls the randomness of the output. Values range from 0.0 to 2.0.

topP.description: The maximum cumulative probability of tokens to consider when sampling (nucleus sampling).

topK.description: The maximum number of tokens to consider when sampling.

responseMimeType.description: MIME type of the generated candidate text. Supported: text/plain, application/json, text/x.enum.

responseSchema.description: Output schema of the generated candidate text when using structured output (application/json).

presencePenalty.description: Positive values penalize tokens that have already appeared, increasing diversity.

frequencyPenalty.description: Positive values penalize tokens based on frequency, decreasing verbatim repetition.

seed.description: Seed for deterministic decoding. Same seed and parameters will attempt to return the same response.

SafetyRating.description: Safety rating for content containing the harm category, probability level, and whether it was blocked.

probability.description: The probability of harm for this content.

blocked.description: Whether this content was blocked because of this rating.

CitationSource.description: A citation to a source for a portion of a specific response.

startIndex.description: Start index of the response segment attributed to this source.

endIndex.description: End index of the attributed segment, exclusive.

CitationMetadata.description: A collection of source attributions for a piece of content.

citationSources.description: Citations to sources for a specific response.

Candidate.description: A response candidate generated from the model containing the generated content, finish reason, safety ratings, and citation metadata.

finishReason.description: The reason why the model stopped generating tokens.

safetyRatings.description: Safety ratings for the response candidate.

index.description: Index of the candidate in the list of response candidates.

PromptFeedback.description: Feedback metadata for the prompt, including block reason and safety ratings.

blockReason.description: If set, the prompt was blocked and no candidates are returned.

safetyRatings.description: Ratings for safety of the prompt.

UsageMetadata.description: Token usage metadata for the generation request.

promptTokenCount.description: Number of tokens in the prompt.

candidatesTokenCount.description: Total number of tokens across all generated response candidates.

totalTokenCount.description: Total token count for the generation request (prompt plus response candidates).

cachedContentTokenCount.description: Number of tokens in the cached part of the prompt.

GenerateContentRequest.description: Request body for the generateContent endpoint. Contains the conversation content, optional tools, safety settings, system instructions, and generation configuration.

contents.description: Required. The content of the current conversation with the model.

tools.description: Tools the model may use to generate the next response.

safetySettings.description: Safety settings for blocking unsafe content.

cachedContent.description: Name of the cached content used as context. Format: cachedContents/{cachedContent}.

GenerateContentResponse.description: Response from the generateContent endpoint containing candidate responses, prompt feedback, and usage metadata.

modelVersion.description: The model version used to generate the response.
